evidence_summary: Establish the immediate aftermath of a skirmish through the discovery of a fallen comrade, driving the protagonist from grief into a high-stakes physical escape.
Amidst the skirmish, Carter discovers Powell's body, killed by arrows. Devastated, Carter retrieves the body and attempts to flee from the pursuing warriors.
